entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,938Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The End (Fragmented)
entry.summary:
Author: thatonetheatrekid14

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,458Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: my favorite lil snippets of merlin and arthur (and gwen and gaius, and morgana) from the last episode of the series in word form bc i looooove subtext :)enjoy! !!!NEW ADDITION COMING SOON STAY TUNED!!!during one of those voice commentary thingies katie mcgrath talked about how she would have wrote the end of the battle of camlann, and it is so so so so so BEAUTIFULso lemme go write that real quick(once i finish the series)

entry.title: Playing with Power
entry.summary:
Author: ToibiLuci

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,185Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Merlin is about to kill innocent people. To stop him, Arthur threatens to take his own life.   A study on Merthur and the scales of power in their relationship, except I make them both a bit more morally skewed for it to be possible.

entry.title: there’s an open door that can lead me to forever
entry.summary:
Author: mrsrumbles

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,317Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 54

Summary: Arthur grows up with Merlin in Ealdor. One day, Camelot’s knights arrive to tell him he’s their prince. “Are you really a prince?” Merlin wondered quietly.”It’s mad.”“Their emblem is a dragon.”Arthur froze and turned around to look at him. “Do you think that might mean something?”

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,675Chapters: 5/13Kudos: 55

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Merlin: A Character Study of His Relationship with Arthur Through Song Lyrics.
entry.summary:
Author: kurokencanon

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,005Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 4

Summary: This essay or analysis examines the relationship between Merlin and Arthur in BBC Merlin, interpreting key scenes, dialogue, and intimate gestures through the lens of song lyrics to highlight emotional motifs such as love, devotion, grief, and destiny. Throughout, it situates the series within broader discussions of queerbaiting and fan resistance literature, showing how close and creative engagement with the text can become a form of reclamation. Ultimately, this work is both an academic and personal exploration, deepening the understanding of Merlin and Arthur’s bond. It’s for fun, made by a fan for the fans.Warning: It’s a Meta (analysis) work: a separate, non-fiction piece discussing fandom, tropes, or the source text. Kurokencanon, November, 2025 - April 2026

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,347Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 114

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: Before (it felt like a sin)
entry.summary:
Author: begaydocrimes10001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,944Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: Merlin had certainly seen something, considering the way he was distractedly stumbling out of the room. But the computer screen was perfectly normal— There was the Wikipedia tab, and a video titled swordfighting tips and tricks, and the google search electricity explained for fools, and what does it mean to be in love with your best friend, and history of Albion, and- Ah. Arthur sighed. Merlin must've seen the love one.Arthur has come to terms with his own feelings about Merlin. Merlin certainly hasn't, though. Come to term with Arthur's feelings, that is.

entry.title: battered hulls & broken hardships
entry.summary:
Author: theonebraincell

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,693Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: The dense crowd parted with an exclamation as the large red and gold dragon lunged forward into the gap left behind. Flames of gold ribboned from its gaping snout, inlaid with enormous pointed teeth. Instinctively, Arthur reached for his empty waist.   [or: arthur continues to adjust to the modern world; merlin takes care of him.]

entry.title: Forever Is My Tomorrow
entry.summary:
Author: Mahogany_Rust

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 453,280Chapters: 47/80Kudos: 1,559

Summary: It had actually been a long time since Hiccup had thought about how he would die.When he was young, every sunrise was another gamble to see if he would get himself eaten by a dragon or somehow manage to fall off one of Berk’s many cliffs.Perhaps Winter would finally choose to break his wiry body with illness or he would catch an unfortunate stray battle axe.Yet here he was, 21, about to die in the wrong place (not a bad age to reach in the Archipelago when you’re Hiccup Haddock, let's be honest). But that was the thing wasn’t it? Hiccup made plenty of marks all in the wrong places. What if one of those marks was in the future? On one unsuspecting spirit’s affections?---- FIMT CINEMATIC TRAILER

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,399Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 117,170Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 103

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: Long Long Ago in the Here and Now
entry.summary:
Author: Love_to_Ship7

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,751Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Merlin Emrys sat and stared at the new student info forms on his desk, while the children read quietly to themselves. After over fifteen hundred years, he couldn't allow the tiniest spark of hope to take shape until he knew for sure. The parents of the brother and sister joining his class were likely history buffs with a passion for Arthurian legends and nothing more. Nothing more than another heartbreak, just like the last twenty he'd followed up on in almost as many decades. He checked to see his students were still working, before taking a moment to close his eyes and remember. Faces, voices, and scents ran through his mind, and he longed for them to be more than distant memories. Damn his lonely heart. It was such a glutton for punishment.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dower the Stars by RurouniHime [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: Billyballz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 8

Summary: During a time of great prosperity in Albion, the Druids offer Emrys a precious gift. Arthur is not amused. (aka, "The Great Conjunction is at Hand, Everyone Kiss Merlin!") Podfic of the amazing work by RurouniHime!

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,023Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 86

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

  • do not take this seriously

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,300Chapters: 173/?Kudos: 148

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forever Yours - Am Byth Yn Eiddo I Chi
entry.summary:
Author: Angelmann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,152Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 32

Summary: King Arthur of Camelot faces catastrophe after catastrophe. His people and his land have fallen victim to reoccuring tragedies and despite their efforts, they are not only losing resources, but also hope. Arthur is in desperate need of a solution.An arranged marriage might save his people from impending doom, but Arthur has to face a long strained relationship with his neighbours, the Druids. Arthur and the Druid Emperor, Emrys, have to overcome their differences, but if they are willing to change is only written in the stars.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
